authType.description: Authentication type to connect to SAP SuccessFactors.

baseUrl.title: Base URL
baseUrl.description: SAP SuccessFactors OData API base URL. For example: https://api4.successfactors.com

companyId.title: Company ID
companyId.description: SAP SuccessFactors Company ID (tenant identifier). Required for all API calls.

authType.title: Authentication Type
authType.description: Choose how to authenticate with SAP SuccessFactors OData API.

username.title: Username
username.description: SAP SuccessFactors user login name. For BasicAuth: used as the credential username. For OAuth2Credentials: used as the SAML NameID — the user on whose behalf the token is requested. The user must exist in the SF system and be permitted to use the OAuth2 application.

password.title: Password
password.description: Password for BasicAuth authentication. Required when authType is BasicAuth.

clientId.title: Client ID
clientId.description: OAuth2 Client ID. Required when authType is OAuth2Credentials.

privateKey.title: Private Key
privateKey.description: PEM-encoded RSA private key used to sign SAML assertions for OAuth2 SAML Bearer flow. Required when authType is OAuth2Credentials.

tokenUrl.title: Token URL
tokenUrl.description: OAuth2 Token endpoint URL. Required when authType is OAuth2Credentials. For example: https://api4.successfactors.com/oauth/token

databaseName.title: Database Name
databaseName.description: Optional name to give to the database in OpenMetadata. If left blank, we will use default as the database name.

tableFilterPattern.title: Default Table Filter Pattern
tableFilterPattern.description: Regex to only include/exclude tables that matches the pattern.
